programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Raj Bisram gambles big on an antique, but will the bidders find this unusual item of furniture as attractive as he does? Margie Cooper buys a deed box, a toolbox and a hat box. She also puts the shopping on hold to visit a local vineyard.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Along the West Sussex coast, it's Margie Cooper's turn to take a gamble on a big-ticket item and Raj Bisram impresses with a magic touch to bag a bargain.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Raj Bisram and Margie Cooper start their last leg in the New Forest. Margie gambles half of her budget on a chic French antique and Raj opts for an eclectic mix of curios from clothes pegs to a cheroot case to a rare piece of TV history.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Newcomer Angus Ashworth challenges David Harper to an antiques duel in Braveheart territory. Armed with a nutcracker, a bear and a swan, will Angus be able to fight off David's punchbowl and shooting stick?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: David Harper and Angus Ashworth continue their Caledonian capers with a pile of old luggage, an adorable canine, a silver-topped cane and a shot on the golf course. Fore!

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Where there's muck there's brass! Rookie Angus Ashworth and old-hand David Harper buy chimney pots, vintage cases and an old washtub. But who'll salvage their fortunes at auction?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: New expert Angus Ashworth and veteran David Harper are happy to be on home turf. David springs for a vintage trouser press, scales and a chestnut roaster, while Angus takes up the sword and powder flask as his auction weapons of choice.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: With his head full of saints and relics, newcomer Angus Ashworh is drawn to two rather gothic purchases, while David Harper gets in touch with his feminist side, snapping up some hatpins he thinks are of Suffragette origin.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Catherine Southon and Tim Medhurst are having fun and chasing profits, from East Sussex to the coast of Dorset. Tim gets his hair washed while Catherine becomes a blacksmith.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Catherine Southon and Tim Medhurst browse around Hampshire and West Sussex. But who'll be victorious at the auction in Hampshire?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Catherine Southon and Tim Medhurst hit the shops, journeying from St Albans to Bushey in their safari-style classic car. Will antique biscuit tins prove to be profitable?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Catherine Southon and Tim Medhurst visit Worcestershire, Oxfordshire and Gloucestershire. Tim unearths what could be a Roman coffin and Catherine phones a friend.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: A girl with some cherries lures Tim Medhurst to part with his cash, while Catherine Southon looks to a kaleidoscope for profit. Who'll reign in Wilshire and claim this Road Trip?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Veteran Road Tripper James Braxton tours the southeast with novice Izzie Balmer, an auctioneer with a penchant for jewelry. Will she take the crown with her jewels?

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael Aspel presents the antiques show from Sherborne in Dorset. Finds include an inflatable paper globe from 1830 and work by the illustrator of Winnie the Pooh.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: In the second visit to Sherborne School in Dorset, the experts find an original monk's bench, letters from Lewis Carroll, an 18th-century satinwood cabinet of great value, a cigarette case, and part of the airframe of the R100 airship.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: This episode of Antiques Roadshow comes from County Sutherland in the Scottish Highlands. Michael is making the journey by train because the venue, Dunrobin Castle, has its very own railway station.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael Aspel returns to Dunrobin in the Highlands for a look inside the Castle with Lars Tharp. There's a selection of unseen treasures from other Roadshows including fine jewelry, silver, and porcelain, and even a collection of Star Wars memorabilia.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: At Renishaw Hall in Derbyshire discoveries include a collection of swords, a homing pigeon clock, a patchwork quilt, and a valuable painting of a lion.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: At Renishaw Hall in Derbyshire, the finds include a portrait by Stanley Spencer and Sir Reresby Sitwell takes a look at what is purported to be Robin Hood's bow.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael Aspel presents in the gardens of Sudeley Castle, Gloucestershire, where the experts look over a fine regulator clock, a sapphire pendant, Winchcombe pottery, and a pouch traded with a dentist by Cligatac Indians in exchange for pulling teeth.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael Aspel and the experts travel to Lake Bala, in north Wales, where they see a pair of books inscribed to a local by Queen Victoria, an unusual collection of tie pins, and a portrait by Charles Spencelayh.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: In Trent, the team finds a jeweled elephant, a patch box in memory of Lord Nelson, an inlaid table from Goa, and a Victorian suit of armor for jousting. Best of all is a Crimea medal awarded to a man who took part in the Light Brigade's Charge.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: A Chinese vase brought to the Roadshow on a skateboard, an Italian dining chair, a French cabinet brought from the Caribbean on a banana boat, and a large Buddha clad in gold leaf - an international mix when the team visits Redruth in Cornwall.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Round-the-world yachtsman Sir Robin Knox-Johnson guides Michael Aspel around the National Maritime Museum in Falmouth, Cornwall, where finds include a Liberty belt buckle, a 16th-century drug jar, and an intriguing gramophone record.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: A set of musical drinking glasses, a pianist's finger stretcher, and Harry Lauder's piano give this edition a musical flavor. The team also finds rare local silver, a valuable doll, and a collection of drawings by Beatrix Potter worth a small fortune.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael Aspel and the team visit Cressing Temple Barns in Essex. Among the rare finds are a collection of ventriloquists dummies, an Italian chair by Bugatti, a watercolor by Russell Flint, and a Chippendale table.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael Aspel's team of experts assess an original manuscript by 19thcentury adventure writer RM Ballantyne and continental furniture and glass, a rare mustard spoon, and a silver picnic set. Plus a trip to Chichester Cathedral.

programme.title: Monty Python's Flying Circus

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando la UAC investiga a las víctimas de posibles asesinatos rituales en Utah, las pistas los llevan a creer que el sujeto que buscan podría estar fascinado con los juicios de brujas de Salem.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Después de una serie de estrangulamientos en Boston, la UAC busca un sospechoso al que le guste guardar recuerdos de las víctimas, y el equipo se pregunta si un vínculo común con las víctimas podría llevarlos al culpable.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Policía bueno, policía malo
programme.desc: Cuando el cadáver de un marine aparece al otro lado del mundo, la investigación obliga a Ziva a desenterrar un capítulo enterrado de su vida.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Código de conducta
programme.desc: Cuando un marine conocido por sus bromas pesadas es encontrado muerto en la víspera de Halloween, el equipo del NCIS descubre que las bromas "inocentes" de la víctima pueden haber inspirado una venganza macabra.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Fugitivos y consuelo
programme.desc: Una investigación de asesinato lleva a Gibbs y al equipo a hacer de consejero familiar de su antiguo mentor, Mike Franks, con la esperanza de evitar un sangriento conflicto internacional.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Fin del juego
programme.desc: Con la ayuda del equipo, Vance se enfrenta a sus demonios mientras descubre una compleja relación con un asesino que pone en peligro a toda su familia.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Un médium se acerca a Danny y Baez, afirmando saber qué le pasó a una mujer que fue encontrada muerta de un aparente suicidio.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Es Reagan contra Reagan cuando Danny va en contra de la orden directa de Jamie durante una negociación de rehenes.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Mientras estaba fuera de servicio, Danny se encuentra con un robo en una gasolinera y se ve obligado a usar su arma, dejándolo conmovido y su familia y compañeros de trabajo preocupados.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Después de que una mujer es asesinada en su apartamento, Danny y Báez recurren a su hija, Margo, para pedir ayuda, pero en cambio ella complica la investigación.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC conoce a su nuevo jefe, Mateo Cruz, un antiguo conocido de JJ. Cruz se une al equipo mientras peinan las calles de Baltimore en busca de un sospechoso que deja a las víctimas incapaces de comunicarse.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Mientras Hotch lucha por su vida debido a las complicaciones del apuñalamiento a manos de George Foyet, también conocido como "The Reaper", experimenta visiones de su difunta esposa, Haley, y su némesis, Foyet.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando la UAC investiga a las víctimas de posibles asesinatos rituales en Utah, las pistas los llevan a creer que el sujeto que buscan podría estar fascinado con los juicios de brujas de Salem.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Después de una serie de estrangulamientos en Boston, la UAC busca un sospechoso al que le guste guardar recuerdos de las víctimas, y el equipo se pregunta si un vínculo común con las víctimas podría llevarlos al culpable.

programme.title: Stanley Tucci: Searching for Italy
programme.desc: Aired 3/21/2021. Stanley Tucci visits Sicily. Here, Stanley tries a salty crunchy sensation, tastes the grapes grown in the region's unique soils, and reflects on Sicilian hospitality.

programme.title: The History of Comedy
programme.desc: Aired 2/9/2017. Tracking the evolution of inappropriate humor throughout history, showcasing the work from groundbreaking comedians who risked their careers, prison sentences, and even their lives as they fought against censorship.

programme.title: The History of Comedy
programme.desc: Aired 2/16/2017. Exploring and celebrating the greatest female comedians of all time and how they were able to succeed in every genre where humor is found despite rampant sexism and prejudice.

programme.title: The History of Comedy
programme.desc: Aired 2/23/2017. Examining how comedians find humor in the simple daily experiences we all share to make us laugh.

programme.title: The History of Comedy
programme.desc: Aired 7/16/2017. Racial humor and comedy about shared experiences have evolved. Comedians reveal how the art of the joke crosses cultural barriers to unite us in laughter.

programme.title: The History of Comedy
programme.desc: Aired 7/23/2017. Tracing the origins of topical humor from the invention of the monologue to the fake news shows of today.

programme.title: Stanley Tucci: Searching for Italy
programme.desc: Aired 3/7/2021. Stanley Tucci eats and drinks his way around Milan. Here, Stanley enjoys an aperitivo, feels inspired to make pizzoccheri – a noodle made from buckwheat, and enjoys classic Milanese – veal chops and risotto.

programme.title: Stanley Tucci: Searching for Italy
programme.desc: Aired 3/14/2021. Stanley Tucci explores his former home: Tuscany. Stanley does a wine bar crawl, celebrates the importance of the lowly loaf and samples dishes which use stale bread as the key ingredient.

programme.title: Stanley Tucci: Searching for Italy
programme.desc: Aired 3/21/2021. Stanley Tucci visits Sicily. Here, Stanley tries a salty crunchy sensation, tastes the grapes grown in the region's unique soils, and reflects on Sicilian hospitality.

programme.title: The History of Comedy
programme.desc: Aired 7/30/2017. Exploring the fascinating mind of the comedian, as well as the difficult road that many seem destined to take, where mental illness and substance abuse are remarkably common.

programme.title: The History of Comedy
programme.desc: Aired 8/6/2017. When it comes to parody and satire, slightly twisting something serious can turn out to be hilarious.

programme.title: The History of Comedy
programme.desc: Aired 8/13/2017. Experts examine the many different ways comedy has lampooned and influenced politics over the years.

programme.title: The History of Comedy
programme.desc: Aired 2/9/2017. Tracking the evolution of inappropriate humor throughout history, showcasing the work from groundbreaking comedians who risked their careers, prison sentences, and even their lives as they fought against censorship.

programme.title: The History of Comedy
programme.desc: Aired 2/16/2017. Exploring and celebrating the greatest female comedians of all time and how they were able to succeed in every genre where humor is found despite rampant sexism and prejudice.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: After leading police on a slow pursuit, a sharply-dressed driver has a heated talk with another deputy. In spite of her tears, police unravel a woman’s lies one-by-one. A traditionally bad omen turns into good luck for a couple.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police chase a man running away from his car and a warrant, a driver is just as unlicensed as his vehicle, and a domestic violence call involves two lovers and a hammer.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies are concerned when a fleeing man leaves a trail of illicit items. A young woman unwisely decides to hang out with a man she nicknamed 'Sketchy.' Some well-placed security cameras help reunite a man with his stolen bike.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An inebriated man is arrested after getting caught peering through the window of a recovery center. After a foot chase officers bring down a well-known local felon. Police respond to a domestic dispute at a local mobile home park.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer spots a suspect returning to an area to pick up a hidden stash of narcotics. An officer learns that occupants of a suspicious vehicle has outstanding warrants. A domestic battery is investigated and justice is served.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police respond to a fight in progress call, officers tail a vehicle leaving a house known for drug activity, and a man calls the police after his wife pushes his Harley over.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man leads Officers on a pursuit across county lines. An Officer assists in an undercover sting to capture drug dealers. An Officer finds a gun in a suspects car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect fresh out of jail is found with narcotics. A motorcycle named 'Love Machine' is saved from a hot wire. A man bursts his tire in a bad place and officers come to the rescue.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies assist an injured woman who vows revenge on her male attackers. A woman tells deputies her husband beat her in front of their children. Officers protect an elderly woman from an abusive child.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A traffic stop becomes dangerous when the suspect takes off on the interstate. Officers find a large bag of drugs in a man’s pants. Officers respond to a dispute at a familiar location.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A driver pursued by police bails from her moving vehicle, a jaywalker decides to run from officers, and a patrol encounters a little boy who decided to run away from home.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man assaults his sister and her dog, a gibberish-speaking man is arrested for attacking his neighbors, and a couple with no-contact orders tells conflicting stories.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers are dumbfounded when a man tries to talk them into taking him to jail. Sparks fly when a driver tries to take his truck on the freeway with only two wheels. Deputies are on guard when they approach a belligerent man.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A couple assaults a tow lot employee who won't release their car, a suspicious man catches a patrol's attention, and police detain a carload of suspected shoplifters.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A brokenhearted man sends deputies on a dangerous pursuit through town, officers uncover a weapon during a traffic stop, and a woman is detained for driving a stolen vehicle.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man gets Tased while resisting arrest, police interrupt a transaction going down in a parked vehicle, and a man fired from his job vents his anger at a gas station.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: When the cuffs come out, an emotional cyclist gives deputies the runaround. A boyfriend’s honesty saves his girlfriend from going to jail on her birthday. Police investigate a case of road rage involving a possible gun.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers engage in a bizarre slow-speed chase after a suspect’s failure to stop. A woman is pulled over after leaving a known drug house. An officer pursues two illegal drag racers on a public highway.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An ATV driver leads deputies on a wild chase, a woman tries to ditch a bag of hard drugs, and an assault suspect is caught off guard by an incriminating voicemail.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect tries to outrun the law by bicycle but can’t out pedal police. A deputy goes undercover to investigate stolen baseballs. A K-9 discovers hidden contraband on a suspect’s most private places.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man on the run with a warrant tries to elude police by busting into a residence and hiding under a blanket, and a fleeing cyclist turns apologetic after being caught.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A motorcyclist wanted by police hides out in his mom's garage, a man won't leave his ex-fiancee alone, and a pregnant woman gets busted for meth possession.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers encounter a restless passenger during a routine traffic stop, deputies track down a shoplifter with a particular taste, and officers respond to a domestic dispute.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Carjacking victims flag down officers whom then locate, pursue and acquire the stolen vehicle, and a man admits to officers the car he's driving is stolen.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police catch up to a man with warrants and a history of resisting arrest, a fidgety driver arouses suspicion, and a minor with beers in his pants has to answer to his mom.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police track a possible stolen vehicle, a man upset with his neighbors takes matters into his own hands, and officers try to placate a man holding a knife to his own throat.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Following a brief pursuit, the desperate driver bails out of the vehicle and flees on foot. An officer responds to an assault call. When a dog owner returns home, she's informed of her dog's mayhem and given a verbal warning and citation.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a college student ends up dead after a "Walking with Dinosaurs" show, the CSIs must determine if his death was murder or accidental.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When the CSI team discovers the shredded remains of a man, they find themselves with multiple suspects who may be responsible for his death.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Two men are murdered right before exposing a natural gas company for poisoning residents in a farming town, and the CSIs must discover who is responsible for their deaths.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A man's fatal fall from a hotel balcony launches the CSIs into an investigation to determine if his death was suicide or the result of foul play.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs set out to track down a pedophile suspected of murdering an FBI agent's wife and kidnapping his children.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a seemingly fake photo of a dead call girl appears online, the CSIs follow up on a lead to find the woman was actually murdered.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs link a body with severe burn marks to possible execution by the electric chair - and to a legendary Vegas murder.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A night full of celebration ends with a bang when the director of a scholarship foundation for the deaf is killed by a deadly car bomb, prompting Sara to interrogate the students and faculty of the college where her mother-in-law works.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A thrift store donation turns gruesome when a dead body is found in a box; meanwhile, Langston's wife pays a surprise visit to the crime lab.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Langston testifies against the notorious 'Dick and Jane' killer, Nate Haskell. Meanwhile, Nick receives a call from troubled teen Jason McCann to warn him of impending danger.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs are on zombie alert when two men initially pronounced dead mysteriously come back to life.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: While investigating the murder of a convicted ex-cop, the CSIs stumble upon a list in his prison cell with names of several individuals he believed might have been his wife's true killer.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A string of deaths, including a gamer found dead on his couch and a newly divorced man at the bottom of a pool, instigate a bet among the CSIs.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Langston and Sara turn to Lady Heather for help in tracking down the culprit responsible for injuring a woman before she was seemingly mauled to death by a mountain lion.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Mientras Russell y su equipo investigan una serie de asesinatos, uno de los suyos se enfrenta al peligro en una arriesgada misión encubierta para acercarse al asesino.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI se apresura a encontrar a Morgan y a Ellie Brass después de su secuestro.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI es llamado para investigar un asesinato y un robo en un juego de póquer.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga un incendio en un concierto musical.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de Investigación de la Escena del Crimen investiga un programa de cocina en vivo.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine Willows regresa para ayudar a los miembros de CSI a resolver un caso antiguo.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga la muerte de un indigente.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga a un desconocido que aparece muerto después de lluvias torrenciales en Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI es llamado para investigar a un hombre que apareció muerto dentro de una bola para hámster de tamaño para humanos.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI es llamado para investigar el apuñalamiento de una pareja.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un fin de semana de spa para algunos de los miembros del equipo de CSI se convierte en una investigación de asesinato.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga un asesinato en una fiesta elaborada.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga un asesinato a bordo de un avión que acaba de aterrizar.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de Investigación de la Escena del Crimen es llamado para investigar un choque de autos.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and the CSIs use radical technology to unlock the secret of a man's mind when he shows up covered in blood with no memory of where he's been.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a murder occurs during a horse race, Horatio and the CSI team discover that Ryan has a personal connection to the case.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Calleigh is in a coma after a smoke inhalation injury sustained while investigating a case involving a dead doctor, drug dealers, and black market organ transplants.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSIs make a shocking discovery about their murder victim, while Horatio tries to save his son from Julia's erratic behavior.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a flight attendant is murdered en route, Horatio Caine and the CSI team uncover all the dirty secrets of airplane travel.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A home invasion becomes much more when Horatio Caine and the CSI team find out they're being targeted by the Russian mob.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When an innocent boy's life is in danger, Ryan is eventually forced to betray Horatio Caine and the rest of the CSI team.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A murder case involving extreme plastic surgery leads Horatio Caine to Ron Saris, who is alive and seeking revenge on Julia.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a reality star is murdered, Horatio Caine and the CSI team delve into the scandalous, sexy world of a TV dating show.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio Caine and the CSI team, work to figure out why a seemingly normal family was targeted in a brutal grenade attack.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate the case of a man boiled alive, Julia spirals out of control, and one of the team's darkest secrets comes to light.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio fights to save Yelina and when Delko goes against Calleigh's plea and helps his dangerous father, his life is put in jeopardy.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: As Delko's life hangs in the balance, Horatio flashes back 12 years to reveal how Miami's CSIs first met and became a team.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When the lab is attacked, Horatio must fulfill a gunman's unique request in order to save five hostages, including new CSI Jesse Cardoza.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando asesinan a tiros a un oficial de policía mientras estaba en el trabajo, el equipo de CSI rastrea a los que él vio esa noche y se entera de que recogió a una prostituta.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga las vidas de quienes viven en un aeroparque de lujo después de que una avioneta se estrella en un lugar popular de Miami Beach.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Encuentran muerto a un guardia de seguridad después de que suenan disparos en el concierto de la estrella del rap 10-Large y llaman al equipo de CSI para investigar.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando la evidencia de una investigación de asesinato lleva al equipo de CSI a creer que el asesino puede estar en Nueva York, Horatio lleva su investigación a la Gran Manzana.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Encuentran estrangulada a una actriz de cine para adultos en el parque y llaman al equipo de CSI para investigar y encontrar al asesino.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Una peligrosa investigación lleva al equipo de CSI por un camino traicionero que conducirá a la trágica pérdida de uno de los suyos.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: La vida de Yelina está en peligro cuando Horatio y el equipo de CSI trabajan en un caso para condenar a un rapero sospechoso de un tiroteo al estilo de Miami desde un auto en movimiento.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un flash mob surge en un campo de golf privado, ¿el grupo de estudiantes estaba allí para esconder un cuerpo o para dejar uno?

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Empujan a una mujer frente a un tren en movimiento del metro de Miami y tanto su novio como la exnovia acosadora son sospechosos de su asesinato.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El ambiente de discoteca de Miami se vuelve mortal cuando el consumo de alcohol por parte de menores provoca un sangriento asesinato en un baño, Horatio y el equipo de CSI investigan.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un viaje de campo del jurado a la escena de un asesinato provoca un vuelco legal cuando el acusado termina muerto y los doce miembros del jurado se convierten en los principales sospechosos.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Una noche de citas rápidas para los solteros de Miami se vuelve mortal para un machote de South Beach que está en el extremo equivocado del carro.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Miami Beach es evacuada debido a un tsunami, pero el equipo de CSI permanece después de descubrir un complot de robo a un banco mientras investiga un asesinato aparentemente aleatorio.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A serial murderer leaves his victims in coded t-shirts. The team struggles to decode his mythological clues and put their main suspect behind bars.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Danny and Lindsay explore the worlds of goth and glam when a young girl that belongs to the underground “suicide girls” cult is found dead.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A young hotel employee falls to her death from a hotel rooftop after she becomes embroiled in a deal with a scheming top model.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac is summoned from a night at the opera to a bloody crime scene. Across town, a famous bachelor is found dead in his swim gym.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a paintball player is found shot to death, Flack realizes that a dirty cop under his supervision could be to blame.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: After a night of heavy partying two underage girls make the reckless decision to drive home. In route, the girls get into an accident.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac and Flack investigate the death of a parachute professional whose chute was pelted with dead pigeons causing him to plummet to the ground.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When Hawkes is framed for shooting a bartender and then later sent to prison, the team takes to the street to set their investigator free.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac and Stella work with a deaf family to find their daughter’s killer. The team investigates the murder of a young skating sensation.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a rich real estate agent is found dead in a brownstone, Mac and Stella work with evidence that suggests he was either a kidnapper or kidnapee.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Danny and Mac find a corpse in a salt truck which is then later identified to be a high-powered extreme sports executive.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a college student is found dead in a maze at the Queen’s county farm museum, the CSIs discover a cult-like fraternity with harsh punishments.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac investigates the death of a girl found in a bathtub filled with rose petals. Stella questions the death of a man who fell in his fish tank.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac and Danny investigate a case in which a delusional ex-con is found dead in his home while lying on top of a bed of cash.

programme.title: CSI: New York: El intocable (S7 Ep16)
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran muerta a una mujer obsesionada con conspiraciones, el equipo de CSI investiga y descubre que algunas de sus teorías pueden haber tenido algo de verdad.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Hacer o morir (S7 Ep17)
programme.desc: Cuando asesinan a un alumno popular en la escuela privada más elitista de Manhattan, el equipo de CSI se encuentra en el competitivo mundo de los más privilegiados.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Crisis de identidad (S7 Ep18)
programme.desc: Jo equilibra los desafíos personales y profesionales cuando su hija adoptiva, Ellie, es la testigo clave en la investigación de un asesinato.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Comida con sentimiento (S7 Ep19)
programme.desc: El equipo entra en el competitivo mundo de los camiones de comida gourmet cuando uno explota en un festival de comida de SoHo mientras Hawkes está ahí con su novia.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Nada a cambio (S7 Ep20)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga la muerte de una mujer como obra de un asesino en serie. Mac vuelve a ponerse en contacto con su primer compañero después de que un ex convicto empieza a acosarlo.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Cadena perpetua (S7 Ep21)
programme.desc: Después de que una lluvia de disparos cruza el laboratorio de criminalística, Mac y su excompañero se convierten en parte de una venganza que lleva 17 años.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Estrategia de salida (S7 Ep22)
programme.desc: Después de una experiencia cercana a la muerte, el detective Mac Taylor está bastante decidido a cerrar su último caso sin resolver.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Imborrable (S8 Ep1)
programme.desc: En el décimo aniversario del 11 de setiembre, Mac y el equipo recuerdan momentos específicos de ese día que les quedaron grabados de forma indeleble en la mente.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Hazlo realidad (S8 Ep2)
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran muerto a un adolescente torpe, el equipo descubre que sus esfuerzos por conquistar el corazón de una atractiva roquera punk pueden haber ido demasiado lejos.

programme.title: CSI: New York: El caballero andante (S8 Ep3)
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran el cuerpo de una hermosa joven en una Ferrari robada, la investigación conduce a una familia de ladrones de autos.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Oficial involucrado (S8 Ep4)
programme.desc: Una salida nocturna amistosa para tomar un trago sufre un cambio inesperado cuando Danny y sus policías novatos se ven envueltos en un tiroteo.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Las apariencias engañan (S8 Ep5)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI de Nueva York investiga cuando el hermano de un joven prodigio del básquet, recientemente liberado bajo palabra, está involucrado en un asesinato.

programme.title: CSI: New York: ¡Déjenme salir! (S8 Ep6)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga cuando una broma de fraternidad en el Día de Brujas sale mal y un maestro de ceremonias es dado por muerto en una tumba abierta.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Juego siniestro (S8 Ep7)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga cuando la noticia de una fiesta en una escuela secundaria se vuelve viral, lo que da lugar a una aglomeración, un porche colapsado y la muerte de una adolescente.

programme.desc: Sirius, Spica, and Vega Platoons depart for a vacation at Murase's inn on Planet Carcalla; when a cry of distress shatters the peace, Manabu realizes the true value of tranquility.

programme.title: The Galaxy Railways
programme.desc: Manabu is selected to join his brother's former unit, but a magnetic disturbance causes trouble for Manabu during his final training session.

programme.title: The Galaxy Railways
programme.desc: Big One is sent on a rescue mission when an emergency signal is received from Kowloon City.

programme.title: Super Dimension Century Orguss
programme.desc: The Glomar must return home as quickly as possible, but that means going to the Port of Lyon, where the Chiram await.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un barco camaronero de dos hombres se hundió cuando una violenta tormenta de rápido movimiento azotó la costa de Luisiana. El capitán se ahogó y el marinero fue rescatado catorce horas después.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Se encontró a Janice Johnson muerta al pie de las escaleras del sótano. La policía de Nueva Escocia tuvo que desenredar las circunstancias que rodearon la muerte de Janice y responder a la pregunta: ¿Fue un accidente o un asesinato?

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un incendio sospechoso arrasó un apartamento y mató a dos mujeres jóvenes. La causa del incendio y la identidad de las víctimas no estaban claras.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se descubre el cuerpo descompuesto de una adolescente, la policía no tiene pistas sobre su identidad.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1991, Pearl Smith, residente de Maine, desaparece después de una discusión con su esposo, Bill Bruns. Los investigadores encuentran un rastro de sangre que conduce al sótano de la pareja.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Batallón de pruebas
programme.desc: Una madre de dos niños pequeños fue encontrada muerta en su habitación.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentra muerta a Leann Fletcher, los investigadores usan análisis de salpicaduras de sangre y computación forense para encontrar el motivo de su asesinato: su esposo, estaba teniendo una aventura con la jueza Susan Chrzanowski.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Intrusión bienvenida
programme.desc: Un hombre le dice a la policía que le disparó a un intruso que había atacado y asesinado a su esposa. El marido pinta un cuadro trágico y es apodado héroe.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1993, Kathryn Bishop de 82 años es encontrada muerta en su hogar de Pennsylvania. Pequeñas pistas en el cuerpo de la víctima le dirán a la policía lo que pasó esa noche.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1992, Laura Houghteling desapareció de su casa en Bethesda y nunca más se la volvió a ver. Los científicos forenses usan evidencia de su habitación para dirigir a la policía hacia un sospechoso principal.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Bruce Miller fue asesinado a tiros en la oficina del negocio de depósito de chatarra que poseía. La escena del crimen estaba casi inmaculada.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Sombra de duda
programme.desc: Una mujer es asesinada a tiros en su tienda solo un día antes de testificar contra el hombre acusado de robarla.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Los sobrevivientes de las atrocidades nazis reconocieron al arzobispo Trifa, exjefe de la Iglesia Ortodoxa Rumana en los Estados Unidos, por haber dirigido un sangriento ataque contra los judíos durante la Segunda Guerra Mundial.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Lleno de humo
programme.desc: Cuando una pareja de ancianos murió en un sospechoso incendio en casa, su hijo se convirtió en el principal sospechoso.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Con un pie en el crimen
programme.desc: El cuerpo descompuesto de una mujer joven fue descubierto en un canal de irrigación de Bakersfield. Si había rastros de evidencia, se había lavado con el agua.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La escena del crimen estaba inundada de sangre, lo que hablaba del horror del crimen: el asesinato de dos niños pequeños y el apuñalamiento de su madre.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: ¿Quién fue el delincuente sexual que asesinó a dos muchachos adolescentes en Nebraska? La clave para detenerlo sería la composición única de la cuerda basura que usó para amarrar a sus víctimas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Se sospecha un juego sucio cuando Glenda Furch, una trabajadora de una fábrica de Fort Worth, desaparece después de completar su turno.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Edward Honaker fue declarado culpable de violación, sodomía y agresión sexual agraviada y condenado a tres cadenas perpetuas en prisión. El sostuvo su inocencia.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un cirujano es apuñalado hasta la muerte y el sospechoso más probable es visto en un restaurante al momento del asesinato.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Cabecera
programme.desc: Cuando los cazadores encontraron un cráneo en un cañón de Texas, la policía encontró trozos de ropa, huesos pequeños y un mechón de cabello.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La policía de Seattle no tenía sospechosos en el violento asesinato de la cantante post-grunge, Mia Zapata.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un misterioso accidente informático llevó a una próspera empresa de fabricación al borde del colapso, poniendo en peligro cientos de puestos de trabajo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una joven fue encontrada muerta, la policía arrestó rápidamente al sospechoso más probable. Pero la tecnología de punta de la NASA permitió a un odontólogo forense demostrar que el hombre equivocado estaba tras las rejas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1986, Gary Dale Larson fue asesinado a puñaladas en su casa de Edmond, Oklahoma. El asesino agredió sexualmente a la novia de Larson, Janet Haynes.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Este episodio documenta un atentado mortal en una iglesia en Oakwood, Illinois, en diciembre de 1997.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1989, April Loveless, de 4 años, fue encontrada muerta en el patio trasero de su casa en Texas. Sus padres le dijeron a la policía que fue atacada y asesinada por perros salvajes. Los investigadores no estuvieron de acuerdo.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: It has all come down to the final night of training camp. Tonight, dreams will be made or broken.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: In this two-hour season premiere of Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team, 600 hopeful candidates arrive at Cowboys Stadium for the Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders preliminary auditions.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Training Camp opens and many of the new candidates have had to uproot their lives and move to Dallas with no guarantee of making it through Training Camp to become a Dallas Cowboy Cheerleader.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: It is just the second week of rehearsals and Kelli and Judy are quick to run the Training Camp Candidates through the signature kick line and jump split.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: In week three of training camp, the rookie candidates are brought in for their DCC makeover. Under the scrutiny of Kelli Finglass, new hairstyles and makeup applications give the girls the DCC look.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: It's week five of training camp and Kelli is out sick. DCC Technical Director, Kitty Carter, fills in and runs the first rehearsal of the week.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Week 7 of training camp begins with a rehearsal on the field at Cowboys Stadium. Kelli and Judy are ready to make final cuts and tonight's rehearsal could determine who makes the squad.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: It's time to announce the DCC squad but first Kelli and Judy put the candidates through a final field rehearsal at Cowboys Stadium. Tensions run high among the girls as Kelli and Judy watch their every step.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The squad has their first game day performance behind them, but after a bad rehearsal, Kelli warns her new team she will cut girls if they don't give 110 percent.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders take a break from the sidelines and travel to Mexico for their annual swimsuit calendar photo shoot.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders are in full dance mode preparing for their first regular-season home game performance. Kelli and Judy want the choreography to be perfect and press the girls through a few intense rehearsals.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: In the final episode of the series, the Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders are preparing for their marquee performance - The Susan G. Komen Cancer Awareness Halftime Show during a nationally televised Cowboys football game.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Dreams are on the line as the tryouts for the Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders 2013-2014 squad begin.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The pressure is mounting as 54 new candidates compete with 32 returning veterans for an invitation into the famed Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders training camp.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Training camp begins at the Cowboys famous training facility, Valley Ranch. First Meeting is filled with excitement and energy until Kelli calls a special meeting of the veterans.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The "scariest night of training camp" kicks off this dramatic episode as the girls learn the dreaded jumpsplit! It's mind over body, as the girls attempt this famed and required move.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The ladies are really challenged when guest choreographer DJ Guthrie teaches them a new dance style. Kelli and Judy have some tough decisions to make about who will remain on the squad.

programme.desc: Things are pretty hot between Craig and Ashley, but he’s disappointed that she keeps pulling back from going all the way.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma decides it’s time to move on in matters of the heart when she realizes she has feelings for new kid Chris.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It’s a big gymnastics meet at Degrassi, and Manny’s going to lead the team to gold! But when she starts to feel sick, she fears that her queasy stomach might be more than the flu or even a bad nerves.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny’s tempted by the romantic family scenario Craig paints and begins to think she and Craig really could keep this baby. Even Ashley shares the news with the entire cafeteria.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Five kids from different worlds are stuck in a room -- on a Saturday! When Raditch introduces Saturday detention, Sean, Ellie, Hazel, Jimmy and Toby are the first inductees.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Just when Terri thought she’d gotten over her ex boyfriend, Rick, he makes a concerted effort to win back her affections. She and her friends are wary – after all, leopards can’t change their spots.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Craig’s determined that he and the guys will be the “Last Band Standing” at Degrassi’s battle of the bands and win a spot on the show. So he sets the guys a fierce practice schedule and starts to write a killer new song.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The year-end Junior Formal is fast approaching, and Marco is in charge, except when it comes to a date. Problem is, Marco’s too nervous to ask Dylan out at all, let alone ask him to the prom.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: A stressed-out Paige and Spinner decide they need a break and skip school for the day. Ashley, meanwhile, is in the doldrums, too “sick” to go to school. So when Ashley calls Paige to get her homework, Paige decides Ash needs to join them in a little fun.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Once again, as things finally start to come together for Sean, the other shoe drops - his brother and guardian, Tracker, has found a new job in Alberta. Sean thinks his life is over until he finds out that he can legally live on his own.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The year end semi-formal is only hours away and Marco has transformed the gym into an idealized Bombay. It promises to be an amazing event, except Marco’s theme is causing tension between him and Ellie. Ellie finds the whole idea racist

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It’s the end of summer and Paige receives some unexpected news - her rape case has finally made it to trial and she’s the star witness. Finally…justice!

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Shocked by the outcome of the trial, Paige holes up in her room. But when Marco is able to coax her out to party at Dylan’s dorm with the gang, things go from bad to worse when she and Spinner have a blow-out fight.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Marco’s a shoo-in for Student Council President until Alex enters the race. While at first Alex seems an unlikely candidate, her strong opinions and anti-establishment platform take hold with the students and Marco realizes she might well win.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Feeling ignored on Student Council, Emma finds a way to get her voice heard when she takes up a new cause - ganging up with the cool kids to keep Terri’s abusive ex-boyfriend Rick, out of Degrassi.

programme.title: Lost Cities of The Ancients
programme.desc: A journey to discover the legendary lost city of Piramesse, a magnificent ancient capital built 3,000 years ago by the Egyptian pharaoh Ramesses the Great.

programme.title: Lost Cities of The Ancients
programme.desc: In the Lambeyeque valley in northern Peru lies a strange lost world, the forgotten ruins of 250 mysterious pyramids, including some of the biggest on the planet, colossal structures made out of mud bricks.

programme.title: Lost Cities of The Ancients
programme.desc: It was one of the greatest vanishing acts in history. More than 3,000 years ago a mysterious and ruthless civilisation rose from nothing, created a brutal and unstoppable army and built an empire that rivalled Egypt and Babylon.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: Are sparrows and blackbirds the direct descendents of a vicious group of dinosaurs including the velociraptor?

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Archaeologist Richard Miles presents a series charting the history of the breakthroughs and watersheds in our long quest to understand our ancient past.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Archaeologist Richard Miles shows how discoveries in the 18th and 19th centuries overturned ideas of when and where civilisation began, as empires competed to `own' the past.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Richard Miles shows how 20th-century attention turned from civilisation and kings to the search for the common man against a background of science and competing political ideologies.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David travels the world to unravel some of the wonders and puzzles of palaeontology. But how do you find the world's oldest and rarest reptile?

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: Could pterodactyls fly? And why did trilobites have such good eyes? David Attenborough investigates the secret lives of animals from the past, as told in the fossil record.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David Attenborough uncovers dinosaur bones in the Sahara desert and visits the biggest, most spectacular dinosaur displays in the world.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David Attenborough uncovers bizarre creatures of the earliest seas, tiny horses the size of spaniels and an animal that's half bird and half reptile - the rarest of them all.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: The earth split in India 66 million years ago in a disaster that may have caused the end of the dinosaurs.

programme.title: How to Build a Dinosaur
programme.desc: Dinosaurs died out 65 million years ago and we have hardly ever found a complete skeleton. So how do we turn a pile of broken bones into a dinosaur exhibit? Dr Alice Roberts finds out how the experts put skeletons back together.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: According to new evidence, the Woolly Mammoth went on roaming until about the time the Pyramids were built.

programme.title: Living with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: David Attenborough learns that descendants of the dinosaur age are alive and well. David explores how they survived the catastrophes that wiped out other species.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Shada
programme.desc: Chris Parsons is happily engrossed in studying post-graduate physics at Cambridge, when one day he finds an old book, sitting on a dusty shelf in an ageing professor's library.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Logopolis
programme.desc: To repair the TARDIS's chameleon circuit, the Doctor goes to Earth for a real police box.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Logopolis
programme.desc: The Doctor travels to Logopolis where a series of fateful events are set in motion.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Logopolis
programme.desc: The Master is loose on Logopolis and is determined to learn the planet's secret.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Logopolis
programme.desc: With the fate of the universe at stake, the Doctor and the Master must collaborate.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Castrovalva
programme.desc: The Doctor tries to recuperate within the Zero Room, leaving Nyssa, Adric, and Tegan to face the Master. Then Adric is taken, and the TARDIS plunges towards Event One.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Castrovalva
programme.desc: The Zero Room is gone, and the Doctor’s regeneration is unstable. To help him, Tegan locates the tranquil world of Castrovalva and the TARDIS heads there.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Castrovalva
programme.desc: Something is wrong with Castrovalva, but the Portreeve cannot help the Doctor identify the problem. And the Master is taunting Adric, caught in his web of power.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Castrovalva
programme.desc: As recursive occlusion threatens to destroy everything and everyone in Castrovalva, the Master’s space/time trap is revealed, with Adric at its heart.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Black Orchid
programme.desc: A murder is committed in Cranleigh Hall. The Cranleighs ask the Doctor to play cricket and then join them for a masked ball, enabling the killer to hide in plain sight.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Black Orchid
programme.desc: The Doctor stands accused, despite Lady Cranleigh knowing he is innocent. What is the secret she is protecting that allows her to let an honest man go to jail?

programme.title: Doctor Who: Earthshock
programme.desc: Silent but deadly androids are protecting a bomb buried beneath the Earth.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Earthshock
programme.desc: With her crew slowly vanishing, Briggs assumes the Doctor to be the guilty party.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Earthshock
programme.desc: The Cybermen are released from their silos and on the march.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Earthshock
programme.desc: The Doctor realises the freighter is now a huge bomb, with one passenger still aboard....

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Time-Flight
programme.desc: When a Concorde passenger jet seemingly vanishes on its final approach to Heathrow Airport, the Doctor is called in to investigate.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Time-Flight
programme.desc: Having been transported 140 million years back into the Jurassic period on Earth, the Doctor must try to work out why the mysterious Kalid has drawn them into this strange domain.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Time-Flight
programme.desc: Deep inside the citadel, the Doctor discovers the legendary Xeraphin who were believed to have been wiped out long ago. They have survived the radiation on Earth by merging themselves into one entity with incredible psychic powers.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Time-Flight
programme.desc: The Doctor must try and return the Concorde passengers back to their own time, but his TARDIS is missing vital components. Will he be able to stop the Master before it's too late? Meanwhile, Tegan is facing a difficult decision about her future.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Arc of Infinity
programme.desc: The Doctor and Nyssa trace something odd to Amsterdam...

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Arc of Infinity
programme.desc: Commander Maxil doesn't believe the Doctor is innocent.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Arc of Infinity
programme.desc: Within the Matrix, the Doctor unmasks Omega and realizes the threat is far from over...

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Arc of Infinity
programme.desc: Omega has been reborn but as a walking anti-matter bomb.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Snakedance
programme.desc: Tegan falls once more under the influence of the Mara and directs the TARDIS to the planet Manussa - but why? Is it a coincidence that the planet is preparing for a ceremony to celebrate the banishment of the Mara five hundred years earlier?

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Snakedance
programme.desc: As the Doctor begins to unravel the legend of the 'Great Crystal', Tegan remains under the Mara's control as it attempts to regain its hold over the planet Manussa.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Snakedance
programme.desc: Still able to influence Tegan from its 'inside world', the Mara set the TARDIS co-ordinates for Manuusa, his home world, where he hopes to re-establish his power.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Snakedance
programme.desc: As the festivities begin, nothing seemingly stands between the Mara and its spectacular return... except the Doctor and a crazy old man in the mountains.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps an adopted terrier mix overcome her terrible fear of men and attempts to solve a pit bull's unhealthy fascination with chewing on rocks.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A beagle has a chewing problem; three German shepherds must be kept apart; a bichon frise dislikes her owner.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Yorkie attacks his leash, plants and a fellow Yorkie; a bull terrier attacks larger dogs; a Jack Russell terrier/Italian greyhound mix barks constantly while her owner is at work.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar Milan's Dog Psychology Center in Los Angeles is both the home and refuge to nearly 50 dogs who are a resource in his work.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: British problem dogs including wild German Shepherds, a dog that must be muzzled by court order, and an English cocker spaniel that hates cars.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Problem dogs in the U.K. including two dogs that spent most of their lives in Africa, and a barking Jack Russell terrier mix.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar's English adventure ends with an aggressive klee kai, a collie mix that hates walks, and a hyper Labrador.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar brings discipline to four chaotic Chinese crested dogs, an over-energetic mastiff mix and two unruly miniature dachshunds.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps the lead singer of Rooney with his aggressive pit bull, while writer and producer Paul needs help with his two Boston terriers.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Playboy Playmates, Miss February 2010 is having trouble with her Chichuahua, while Orange County, Miss September 2011 with her terrier pug mix.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps comedians Skyler Stone, Ralphie May and Paul Rodriguez get to grips with their unruly hounds.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps dogs overcome their fears including a whippet mix who is blind and deaf, a labradoodle that fears the ocean, and a cocker spaniel that fears all humans.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar meets NASCAR driver Kevin Harvick to help with his snappy Chihuahua and an aggressive Pekingese called Gizmo.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps fitness guru Jillian Michaels with her aggressive Chihuahua, while "Frasier" star Kelsey Grammer needs help house-training his dogs.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: What starts out as a perfect day for Dog turns ugly fast. He and Beth are enjoying helping their kids learn how to care for their new pets, when duty calls for a tough case. The charges: alleged cruelty to animals.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: In between tracking down a potentially dangerous ex-con facing a five-year stretch in the big house, Leland is struggling to find time to train and compete for his first boxing match in years.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and family head to Kona to track down a wanted father who's looking to bolt to the mainland to evade sentencing. Meanwhile, Dog does some evading of his own - Avoiding the much dreaded birthday party!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the team need to help Leland hunt down some elusive fugitives The case is a family affair with both mother and daughter in trouble with the law.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog knows that crime and drugs not only damage victims but also harm the families of the perpetrators, especially the kids. And both of the fugitives he's chasing today have left shattered families and struggling women in their wake.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Jim is a bondsman and longtime friend of Dog. Jim's son has just started in the family business. Today Jim has asked Dog to track down a potentially dangerous fugitive, and take his son along for some training with the best in the world.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his posse head to Colorado for a special mission, to catch Marco, an alleged drug dealer. It's been ten months since Marco went on the lam, and his bondsman stands to lose his family business if Marco is not caught.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The trail is hot and the stakes is high for Dog and the posse. The "Big Fish" in this case is Marco, an alleged drug dealer with a big bond. But a major key to catching him is Elizabeth, who is also a fugitive from the law.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is still on the search for the elusive fugitive, Marco. Dog has been tracking him across Colorado, from Grand Junction to Denver, and now a hot tip that a long time associate of his is hiding in Pueblo sends the team racing south.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the posse travel to the Big Island to help Leland track down a small-time Bonnie and Clyde couple. Their crime: theft, including allegedly stealing a pair of Buddha statues for resale.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: This fugitive is hard to pin down in Honolulu's downtown district, moving from hostel to hotel to apartment high-rise. But as the hunt evolves, Dog discovers that this alleged burglar isn't the only family member wanted by the law.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When a stripper goes on the lam, Dog has to bring her in, it's a tough job, but somebody has to do it. Thankfully for the team, Lady Luck is presiding over the posse tonight.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Leland learns that one of his clients with a reputation for stealing has lost her co-signer and could be ready to run, Dog and the crew hop a plane to the Big Island.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Baby Lyssa's wedding is only three days away, but Dog is thinking about bounties, not bouquets. A hot bounty comes in and Dog wants to go on the hunt. When the ladies object, Dog explains his decision, "We're a family of hunters, we need to hunt."

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's target today seems to have a taste for drugs and a record of reckless driving. The hunt has deep emotional resonance for the team because today is the anniversary of the fatal car accident of Dog's daughter Barbara Katie.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: What looks like a routine pick-up turns into a complicated case of betrayal, deceit, as well as quality nail care as Dog and company track down a fugitive alleged to be an abusive boyfriend with one too many friends in his close-knit community.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: This fugitive has a bad reputation and a knack for running from the law. The pursuit has Dog and team traveling through an urban dystopia of suspicion, false leads and mistrust.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: Julian dashes to an emergency - Vet Matt needs an experienced pair of hands. A young heifer, Bonnie, is struggling to give birth naturally. Peter sees old pal Benji the bouncy border terrier who has been vomiting and is in grave danger.

programme.title: Dogs On The Job
programme.desc: It might be hard to look at a Chihuahua and see how it could have descended from the gray wolf, , but this is where all dogs come from

programme.title: Funniest Pets & People
programme.desc: Dog breaks into fridge and steals pizza; dog picks apples off tree; the pretzel maniac; squirrel stuffs mouth with cotton; dogs spit marshmallows into owner's mouth.

programme.title: Pet Obsessed
programme.desc: Featuring ridiculous clips, digital shorts and tons of fluff; these are the internet's most outrageous and outspoken pets... A.K.A. your newest obsession!

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: A young Ewe is struggling to birth, her not-so-little lamb has his head stuck which puts both their lives in jeopardy. If Peter pulls him out, it could kill mum, but a caesarean will take too long for the baby. They must make a difficult decision.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: Julian Norton, Peter Wright, and their staff deal with more animal emergencies. This episode includes a dog facing an emergency operation to remove a tumour and a prolapsing sheep that has to be treated on the car park.

programme.title: Pet Obsessed: Four Paw Entertainment
programme.desc: These pets deserve to take home a golden bone.

programme.title: Breeder of the Pack
programme.desc: Debra Hull breeds her Basset Hounds to be a top competitor in the show ring, and she doesn’t approve of second place.

programme.title: Pick a Puppy
programme.desc: The Johnstone family meets a three different rescue dogs, but can only pick one to give all of their love. Will it be JJ- a Maltese mix, Marley- a Labrador Retriever, or Ruby- a German Shepherd mix?

programme.title: Going To the Dogs
programme.desc: Quincy the Schnauzer is one point away from his championship title.

programme.title: Animal Attractions
programme.desc: If you're a pet lover you probably have questions like; how do I keep my puppy from digging up the yard, and how do I teach my dog not to jump all over me? We've got the answers.

programme.title: Dogs with Jobs
programme.desc: GRACIE: GREYHOUND'S GREYHOUND (Calgary, Alberta) Rescued from the Humane Society, Gracie finds herself competing to be THE greyhound for Greyhound Bus Lines advertising.

programme.title: Pet Obsessed: Workaholics
programme.desc: It's been a hard day's night, and they've been working like a dog

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: Julian has a mystery to solve when he treats two pet goats that have been attacked by an unknown animal. Peter visit an old friend's farm where he meets a pig that is under the weather. One of two dogs has eaten children's vitamin pills.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: Peter treats a lamb that was born with a life-threatening cyst full of spinal fluid on its head, which will require delicate and painstaking surgery to safely remove.

programme.title: The Dog Rescuers
programme.desc: At an address in the Wirral, Inspector Anthony Joynes finds two collie crosses, Patch and Socks. Both dogs are in very poor condition and Anthony needs to get them out.

programme.title: The Dog Rescuers
programme.desc: QI expert, Alan Davies, introduces incredible stories of Dog rescues from the RSPCA's Leybourne Animal Centre.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: In this episode, Julian treats a much-loved moggie with a badly swollen eye where surgery might be the only option. Head Nurse Sarah is extremely worried about her own dog, Copper, who is off his food, losing weight, and going downhill fastest.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: Peter Wright treats two kittens that have been dumped in a bag and set on fire. Shona performs an emergency Caesarean to try and save a cow and her calf. Julian hopes to help a dog suffering from a rare spinal condition.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake buys back his racehorse Allegre from owner Daniel Reece, who sends Krystle a gift. Furious, she demands to know how he dared approach her after what happened with her sister, Iris. Amanda learns she is Blake's daughter.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle reconciles with Daniel, who reveals that his break-up with her sister was amicable. Claudia moves into La Mirage. Krystle confides to Steven that Daniel is Sammy Jo's father and therefore little Danny's grandfather.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Claudia rebuffs Steven's conciliatory attempts. Tension between Dex and Amanda continues to mount. On his deathbed, Tom Carrington makes amends with Blake, and in a final dramatic gesture, has his will changed.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle begins working with Daniel. Blake is adamantly opposed and exchanges harsh words with Reece. Dex is furious with Alexis for traveling to Sumatra to see Blake's father. Alexis learns from Amanda about Dex's experience with Daniel in Vietnam.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle launches her new business with the purchase of an Arabian horse. Sexual tension between Steven and Luke mounts. Jeff and Nikki return from Bolivia with the news of their marriage and they move into the mansion.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake returns triumphant from his negotiations with the Chinese. Alexis vows to buy into the venture. Krystle, uncomfortable with Daniel's increasing attention, avoids him. Blake invites Amanda to accompany him on a business trip to Acapulco.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis attempts to persuade the head of the Chinese delegation to hire Colbyco. Blake is surprised to learn Lady Ashley is an Acapulco. Amanda has a romantic fling with Prince Michael of Moldavia. Krystle makes a surprise visit to Daniel.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Amanda spends the night with Prince Michael and then is heartsick to learn he is engaged. Dex persuades the Chinese delegation to use his company instead of Blake's for an important drilling job. Claudia finally accepts Adam's advances.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Tensions between Krystle and Blake mount as their suspicions of one another grow. Claudia regrets sleeping with Adam. Dominique derails Alexis' attempt to buy out her company but is unable to stop Brady's divorce proceedings.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Dominique remains in critical condition after collapsing. Luke pays an unexpected visit to Steven. Blake tells his son that he will support him regardless of his sexual persuasion. Alexis calls her former lover, King Galen, a Middle Eastern monarch.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis attempts to persuade King Galen to allow a marriage between Amanda and his son. She sweetens the offer by suggesting his country would receive a portion of Colbyco's revenues. Dominique advises Krystle to reconcile with Blake.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis is relieved and Blake is concerned when Amanda suddenly changes her mind and decides to marry Prince Michael. Sammy Jo is revealed to be the culprit behind the compromising photographs.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Claudia flies to Mexico to divorce Steven. Unexpectedly, Adam appears at her hotel and they spend the night together. After Amanda embarrasses Prince Michael at Dominique's party, his patience is exhausted and he leaves her.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake and Daniel survive the plane crash. Jeff charters a helicopter and braves hazardous conditions to finally locate the wreckage. Krystle and Blake finally clear the air and renew their commitment to each other.

programme.title: End Of The Big Cats
programme.desc: Prosecuted for many decades, Africa's lion population has declined to only twenty thousand, and many biologists and conservationists are starting an international campaign to save these extraordinary animals.

programme.desc: This time on the cheetah diaries, After losing her leg, is Legend on the road to recovery? It's time for the final fox family meal. Today Bat-eared fox pups, Batman, Foxtrot and Foxtail are leaving parents Brad and Janet for their new home.

programme.title: Jungle Planet

programme.title: Wildest Survival
programme.desc: From brutal cold, to extreme heat, from the ocean depths, to the driest of deserts, this episode showcases some incredible survival stories in the world's most inhospitable environments.

programme.title: Across The World With Te Radar
programme.desc: Te Radar travels to Cuba to discovers what happens when a country is forced to go back to nature and he draws on their experiences of ways to farm using natural solutions, without chemicals and often without modern machinery.

programme.title: Aging In The Wild
programme.desc: In this episode, we explore how different animal species react to impending death. We explore the factors that lead animals to their final resting places: disease, injury, predation, drought, famine.

programme.title: 1-800-Missing
programme.desc: At the wedding of Eric's best friend, the groom is attack and the bride goes missing, pushing Brooke into the work mode.

programme.title: Step Up: High Water
programme.desc: The dancers prepare for the big opening night; Poppy's mother visits High Water; Zo gives Tal shocking news; Rigo receives unexpected help; Odalie takes a desperate last step.

programme.title: Step Up: High Water
programme.desc: The big tour begins; Dondre discovers a secret that can change everything between him and Poppy; Rigo discovers the truth about his father's death; Odalie has her moment of fame; Sage makes a dramatic proposal for Collette.

programme.title: Step Up: High Water
programme.desc: After their mother is arrested, twins Janelle and Tal are sent to live with their Uncle Al in Atlanta, where Janelle learns about the High Water performing arts school in their new neighborhood.

programme.title: Step Up: High Water
programme.desc: Forced outsider her comfort zone, Janelle struggles at her High Water audition; Tal confronts his bullies.

programme.title: Step Up: High Water
programme.desc: Tal battles to keep up with his new classmates; Sage makes an unexpected announcement; Davis is faced with a family issue that could derail his future.

programme.title: Step Up: High Water
programme.desc: Janelle and Dondre can't seem to hide their true feelings; alliances at High Water are challenged.

programme.title: Greenleaf
programme.desc: Grace takes Rochelle up on her offer to help start a legal defense fund; Bishop and Lady Mae ask if parishioner Clara Jackson's Powerball winnings can assist with their IRS bill.

programme.title: Greenleaf
programme.desc: The Bishop sends Lady Mae into a tailspin when he surprises her with divorce papers; Grace gives a newspaper interview in Mae's place, while deploying Darius to investigate Rochelle.

programme.title: Greenleaf
programme.desc: Lady Mae visits world-famous Pastor Maxine Patterson and endures the Bishop's final attempt to win her back at a Round Table party; Connie asks if Grace is interested in running Calvary.

programme.title: Greenleaf
programme.desc: The Bishop and Lady Mae make alternate plans after Clara denies them the check for the IRS bill; Grace tends to Sophia when a medical emergency sends her daughter to the hospital.

programme.title: Greenleaf
programme.desc: Maxine Patterson visits Calvary during the same weekend that Lady Mae and the Bishop announce their divorce to the congregation; Grace and Rochelle find a case for their legal defense fund.

programme.title: Greenleaf
programme.desc: Grace questions her involvement in the Coralie Hunter case when the district attorney threatens to reopen her case with Mac; the Bishop and Lady Mae disagree on hosting A Day With Lady Mae at Calvary.

programme.title: Power
programme.desc: Tensions run high when Tate tasks Dre to kill Ghost; Tate's hatred toward St. Patrick motivates him to lie during a Federal questioning; the Feds are in striking distance of convicting St. Patrick for Silver's murder.

programme.desc: Lucy is jealous when Ricky is asked to pose with five beautiful starlets for publicity photos and tries to get herself in on the action by inserting herself into every shot. Lucy is even more upset when Ricky goes to his first Hollywood premiere.
